name: Supplier Order-to-Cash Process
documentation: End-to-end order management process from supplier customer service through order creation, warehouse fulfillment, logistics, and payment reconciliation.

elements.name: Customer Service Representative
elements.documentation: Supplier employee who reviews customer sales figures, inventory, and creates orders

elements.name: Warehouse Manager
elements.documentation: Manages warehouse operations and converts orders to pick orders

elements.name: Warehouse Worker
elements.documentation: Picks items, registers completion, and places goods on dock

elements.name: Carrier
elements.documentation: Transport provider who loads and scans goods for shipment

properties.value: Verantwoordelijk voor tijdige en volledige aflevering

elements.name: Customer
elements.documentation: External customer who validates orders and receives goods

properties.value: Ontvanger van product, communicator en betalen van factuur

elements.name: Accountant
elements.documentation: Reconciles payments and closes orders

elements.name: Order Creation
elements.documentation: Process of creating order based on customer inventory and sales data

elements.name: Order Validation
elements.documentation: Customer validates and confirms order

elements.name: Warehouse Fulfillment
elements.documentation: Converting order to pick order and assembling goods

elements.name: Shipment and Tracking
elements.documentation: Loading goods, scanning, and tracking shipment status

elements.name: Goods Receipt
elements.documentation: Customer receives and registers goods as received

elements.name: Invoice Generation
elements.documentation: Automatic invoice creation upon shipment

elements.name: Payment Processing
elements.documentation: Customer payment via bank to supplier

elements.name: Order Closure
elements.documentation: Accountant reconciles payment and closes order

elements.name: Supplier ERP
elements.documentation: Enterprise Resource Planning system for supplier

elements.name: Customer ERP
elements.documentation: Enterprise Resource Planning system for customer

elements.name: Warehouse Management System
elements.documentation: Logistics system managing picks, inventory, and warehouse operations

elements.name: Carrier Management System
elements.documentation: Transport provider system tracking shipments and status

elements.name: Middleware
elements.documentation: Integration layer connecting supplier and customer ERPs

elements.name: Order
elements.documentation: Order document containing items and quantities

elements.name: Pick Order
elements.documentation: Warehouse instruction for picking items from stock

elements.name: Invoice
elements.documentation: Billing document sent to customer

elements.name: Shipment Status
elements.documentation: Tracking information from carrier

elements.name: Bank System
elements.documentation: Financial institution processing payment

elements.name: Salesorder
elements.documentation: Customer order generated by Customer Service Representative

elements.name: Invoice
elements.documentation: Invoice to be paid by customer and validated by Accountant
